settings.text: No time for bad hair days? Fix your hairline in seconds.

settings.title: How to Use
settings.subtitle: Three steps. Ten seconds. Done.
settings.step_1_desc: Press the concealer applicator directly onto dry hair, focusing on sparse areas, your hairline, or any thinning patches you want to fill.
settings.step_1_tip: Apply to completely dry hair for best results
settings.step_2_desc: Use your fingertips or a soft brush to lightly blend the product into your natural hair. It grips every strand and disappears — no powdery residue.
settings.step_2_tip: Light circular motions give the most natural finish
settings.step_3_desc: Wear it through meetings, workouts, and nights out. Sweat-resistant, humidity-proof, and completely undetectable until you wash it out.
settings.step_3_tip: Washes out easily with regular shampoo

settings.title: Before & After
settings.subtitle: Drag the slider to see the difference.
settings.caption: Instant Results

settings.text: Achieve a fuller, more defined hairline in seconds. This lightweight concealer blends seamlessly with your natural hair for a flawless, undetectable finish that lasts all day.

settings.title: How do I use the hairline concealer?
settings.text: Simply apply the powder directly to dry hair using the applicator, focusing on sparse areas. Blend lightly for a natural finish.

settings.title: Will it look natural?
settings.text: Yes! The formula is designed to match your hair and blend seamlessly for a soft, natural look.

settings.title: Does it stay on all day?
settings.text: Absolutely. It’s long-lasting and resistant to sweat and light moisture.

settings.title: Is it suitable for all hair types?
settings.text: Yes, it works on all hair types and textures.

settings.title: Will it feel heavy or sticky?
settings.text: Not at all. The formula is lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear.
